3285890.name: Darkfield
3285890.description:
Average time to complete the game: 40 minutes

Marc, a man who recently bought a house in a remote, forested area, soon realizes he made a mistake. He purchased the house at a very low price, but there was a reason for that – the house was cursed. The house, being quite old, needed repairs, so Marc went to the property to start fixing it up. However, strange things began to happen. Feeling unsettled, Marc called his nephew for help.

In this game, you play as Marc’s nephew, who must visit Marc’s house and investigate the mysterious events that have taken place there.

Game Features:

- The game is made on Unreal Engine 5.

- The genre of "Walking Simulator".

- The gameplay is close to realism.

- As the game progresses, the way the main character sees the environment changes to the view through the camera.

-Drive to your uncle's house.

-Investigate the strange events that happened at your uncle's house.
3285890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
